query:
SELECT 
  SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * fph.pricePerUnit * 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
  ) as total_daily_feed_cost_sar,
  SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * fph.pricePerUnit * 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
  ) * 30 as monthly_feed_cost_sar
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON rp.feedItemId = fi.id
JOIN feed_item_price_history fph ON fph.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
  AND fph.effectiveDate = (SELECT MAX(fph2.effectiveDate) FROM feed_item_price_history fph2 WHERE fph2.feedItemId = fi.id);

SELECT 
  SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * fph.pricePerUnit * 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
  ) as total_daily_feed_cost_sar,
  SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * fph.pricePerUnit * 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
  ) * 30 as monthly_feed_cost_sar
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON rp.feedItemId = fi.id
JOIN feed_item_price_history fph ON fph.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
  AND fph.effectiveDate = (SELECT MAX(fph2.effectiveDate) FROM feed_item_price_history fph2 WHERE fph2.feedItemId = fi.id);
